kirundi.click_the_number_line_above_to_place_a: Fyonda umurongo w'imibare wo hejuru ushireho ikimenyetso.
kirundi.number_line_marker_use_arrow_keys_to_m: Ikimenyetso c'umurongo w'imibare. Koresha buto z'akambi kugira ngo wimuke, Home/End ku mpera, Shift ku ntambwe nini.
kirundi.click_a_chip_below_the_marker_slides_a: Fyonda agakarito ko hasi. Ikimenyetso kiranyerera; amashusho yose ane arahindurwa. Umurongo wiyongera wenyine niwarenga impera.
kirundi.common_denominator_hunter_how_to_add_f: 🤝 Umuhigi w'Umubare Ushira Hasi Usanzwe — uko wateranya ibice bifite imibare ishira hasi itandukanye
kirundi.you_cannot_add_1_2_1_3_directly_first_: Ntushobora guteranya 1/2 + 1/3 ako kanya. Banza ushake umubare ushira hasi usanzwe (LCM irakora), wandike buri gice bushasha, hanyuma uteranye imibare iri hejuru.
kirundi.first_fraction_numerator: Umubare uri hejuru w'igice ca mbere
kirundi.first_fraction_denominator: Umubare ushira hasi w'igice ca mbere
kirundi.second_fraction_numerator: Umubare uri hejuru w'igice ca kabiri
kirundi.second_fraction_denominator: Umubare ushira hasi w'igice ca kabiri
kirundi.equivalent_fractions_same_point_many_n: ∞ Ibice bingana — ahantu hamwe, amazina menshi. Fyonda kugira ngo wongere ugabanye umurongo.
kirundi.multiply_or_divide_the_top_and_bottom_: Gwiza (canke ugabanye) umubare uri hejuru N'uwo hasi ku mubare umwe → agaciro kamwe, izina ritandukanye. Ikimenyetso ntikinyeganyega.
kirundi.a_quarter_is_0_25_1_4_of_a_dollar_a_di: Kimwe ca kane ni $0.25 = 1/4 c'idolari. Dime ni $0.10 = 1/10. Ibiceri ni imyitozo y'ibikubo.
kirundi.3_4_means_3_divided_by_4_type_3_4_into: 3/4 bisigura «3 bigabanyijwe na 4». Andika 3 ÷ 4 kuri kalkuleteri iyo ari yo yose: 0.75. Umurongo w'igice na ÷ bisigura kimwe.
kirundi.a_decimal_is_a_fraction_with_a_hidden_: Igikubo NI igice gifite umubare ushira hasi uhishe.
kirundi.1_2_0_5_stops_1_4_0_25_stops_1_3_0_333: 1/2 = 0.5 (birahagarara). 1/4 = 0.25 (birahagarara). 1/3 = 0.333… (bisubiramo iteka). Umubare ushira hasi niwo ufata icemezo: nigabanijwemo gusa na 2 na 5, birarangira. Bitabaye ivyo birasubiramo. Raba ikimenyetso ↻ ku ikarita y'igikubo.
kirundi.explore_the_visual_home_for_number_sen: Rondera — urugo rw'amashusho ku kumva imibare
kirundi.numbers_as_positions_on_a_line_not_jus: Imibare nk'imyanya ku murongo, atari ibimenyetso gusa. Imibare mibi yigaragaza hafi ya zeru. Ibice biri HAGATI y'imibare yuzuye; ibikubo ni iciyumviro kimwe gitomoye neza. Common Core 2.MD.6, 3.NF.2, 6.NS.6.
kirundi.where_does_7_8_sit_what_about_2_4_esti: 7/8 iri he? Naho −2.4? Kugereranya bubaka kumva ubunini. Ubushakashatsi (Siegler 2009) bwerekana ko ukuri ku murongo w'imibare guhanura intsinzi y'imibare izaza neza kurusha ivyukuri vyafashwe mu mutwe.
kirundi.skip_count_the_bridge_to_multiplicatio: Kubara Usimbuka — ikiraro kija ku kuba
kirundi.2_4_6_8_the_2_times_table_walking_skip: 2, 4, 6, 8… = imbonerahamwe yo kuba ya 2 igenda. Kubara ku 5 na 10 bitegura amafaranga n'igihe. Kubara usubira inyuma ku 3 bitegura gukuramwo no kugabanya. Umurongo werekana injana.
kirundi.a_fraction_is_a_division_problem_a_dec: Igice ni ikibazo co kugabanya. Igikubo ni igice gifite umubare ushira hasi uhishe 10, 100, 1000… 1/4 na 0.25 ni ahantu HAMWE ku murongo. Common Core 4.NF.6, 4.NF.7, 5.NBT.3.
kirundi.two_fractions_four_possible_relationsh: Ibice bibiri, isano enye zishoboka: bingana, bikora ku kimenyetso ½, A gito canke B gito. Kurura slidars, andika ico ubona, kandi wandike itegeko ryawe ryo kugereranya.
kirundi.adjust_the_numerators_and_denominators: Hindura imibare iri hejuru n'ishira hasi y'ibice bibiri. Widget ikubwira imwe mu isano enye zitandukanye. Nta manota, nta kugaragaza — kurura gusa hanyuma witegereze.
kirundi.hypothesis_free_text_when_do_two_fract: Iciyumviro (inyandiko yigenga): Ni ryari ibice bibiri bingana? Ni ryari kimwe kiri hafi ya ½?
kirundi.find_two_fractions_with_different_nume: Shaka ibice bibiri bifite imibare iri hejuru n'ishira hasi itandukanye ariko bingana.
kirundi.when_are_two_fractions_easy_to_compare: Ni ryari ibice bibiri vyoroshe kugereranya? Ni ryari bigoye?
kirundi.explain_how_to_compare_two_fractions_w: Sigura uko wagereranya ibice bibiri utabihinduye igikubo.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_4_state_outcome_n: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: igisubizo gitandukanye c'imimerere 4; nta manota yo kugereranya ibice; nta kugaragaza — ku bushake.
kirundi.1_4_tabs_n_new_challenge_ai_tutor_on_m: ⌨️ 1-4: tab | N: imbogamizi nshasha | ?: umwigisha wa AI | ← → ku kimenyetso: imura | Home/End: impera
kirundi.integer_lab_summary: Ugurura mini lab igihe negative numbers ari zo focus.
